keywords: Appeal arising out of an order made by the High Court established by Article 154P(1) of the Constitution in the exercise of its appellate jurisdiction vested in it by Article 154P(3)(b) of the Constitution-Where does appeal lie from an order as such in terms of section 9 of the High Court of the Province (Special Provisions) Act- Is it to the to the Court of Appeal or to the Supreme Court.
legistation: Constitution of the Democratic Socialist Republic Of Sri Lanka- Articles 154P(1), 154P(6), 154P(3)(b), section 9 of the High Court of the Province (Special Provisions) Act.
